LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALLERGAN, INC'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT APPLICATION OF THE DISCOVERY RULE, THE CLAIMS ARE NOT AN IMPROPER ATTEMPT TO ENFORCE THE FDCA, AND THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECEIT AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION ARE PLED WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS DENIED. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STATED THAT DEFENDANT HAS 20 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE ITS ANSWER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620

Notice Of Continued Hearing On Allergan'S Demurrer And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ALLERGAN, INC.'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Joshua J. K. Henderson, Esq. of Carcione, Cattermole, Dolinski, Stucky, Markowitz & Carcione, L.L.P. 650/367-6811 for pltf & opposing party; Caitlin C. Blanche, Esq. of Snell & Wilmer L.L.P. 714/427-7000 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT APPLICATION OF THE DISCOVERY RULE, THE CLAIMS ARE NOT AN IMPROPER ATTEMPT TO ENFORCE THE FDCA, AND THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECEIT AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION ARE PLED WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY.
DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS DENIED.
In addition, the Court stated that defendant has 20 days from notice of entry of order to file its answer. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
